evidence: "This film is already a bonkers 'horror' classic..."
"How do folks not know about Firefly / Serenity?"
"An otherwise very simple, sparse film is filled by first rate jokes."
"This double-feature is exactly that, and nothing else, which was fine with me."
"RiffTrax Boys set their joke phasers to Kill."
"The RiffTrax Boys do mighty battle with Supersonic Man..."
"...the Wachowskis' eye for set design is stunningly beautiful."
"RiffTrax SO needs to do more classic Chuck Norris films!"
"...the DVD itself is full of everything I want as a film / TV fan..."
"...the RiffTrax Boys are unrelentingly funny in their send up of this train wreck."
"Deeply moving portrayal by Jeffrey Tambor, perhaps too moving..."
"...this is also one of the most original universes anyone has attempted in Hollywood..."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of sci-fi and comedy, particularly appreciating the humor and simplicity of narratives. They show a strong preference for high-quality production and have a notable loyalty to creators like RiffTrax and Joss Whedon.
